title: Clean ARCHITECTURE.md of leftover task instructions and fix accuracy gaps
description:
Fix these architecture gaps (from architecture.json):
1. MAJOR: Remove leftover task instructions from lines 55-75 in ARCHITECTURE.md — these are not architecture documentation
2. Fix Provider/ToolDefinition location: architecture says they're in types.ts but they're actually in agentic-core now (src/providers/ was deleted)
3. Fix 'Provider Resolution fallback example' (line 51): shows createOpenAIProvider(baseUrl, apiKey, model) but actual code passes config object
4. Fix overview: says 'single ask()' but also exports createProvider()
5. Fix tools/index.ts description: says 'tool registry' but it's a barrel export; registration logic is in ask.ts
6. Add toolConfig to AgenticConfig fields listing
Acceptance: architecture match improves from 93% toward ≥95%
